prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
Hey there, I know you've been putting this task off, but it's time to buckle down and show yourself what you're made of. Remember, you're stronger and more capable than you give yourself credit for. 

This task might seem daunting, but you've overcome challenges before, and you'll do it again. Break it down into small, manageable steps and tackle them one by one. Every step you complete will bring you closer to your goal and give you the momentum you need to keep going.

Don't let fear or doubt hold you back. Trust in your abilities and the preparation you've done up until this point. You've got this, and once you start, you'll find that the hardest part was beginning. So take a deep breath, put on your game face, and show that task who's boss!
